overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a long coat and hat exploring a snowy gothic castle at night. The character walks through stone corridors, emerges onto balconies with views of illuminated castle towers, and descends outdoor staircases lit by torch braziers.

events.description: character walks through archway from interior corridor onto exterior balcony

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor toward the balcony archway

entered.detail: large stone archway at the end of the corridor
ornate stone column lining the corridor
ornate stone column lining the corridor
stone floor with patches of snow
lit lantern mounted on the corridor wall
archway leading to the exterior balcony
stone railing along the balcony edge
stone railing along the balcony edge
illuminated gothic castle towers visible through the arch

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit interior stone corridor with gothic arches and pillars. Snow dusts the stone floor as the character approaches a balcony archway, emerging toward an exterior view of illuminated castle towers.

events.description: character pauses to look at the castle towers, then turns to continue along the balcony

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony railing and pausing to view the illuminated castle towers in the distance

entered.detail: dark blue night sky with clouds
patterned stone paving of the balcony
snow-covered mountain range in the background

changed.from: framing the archway exit left_near and right_near
changed.to: lining the left and right sides of the path

segments.scene_description: On the open balcony, the character walks along stone balustrades under a dark night sky. The illuminated gothic castle towers dominate the left side of the view, with distant snow-covered mountains visible beyond. The character pauses to take in the view before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered castle walkway with lit windows

events.description: entering covered corridor with warm artificial torchlight replacing the cool moonlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor with stone benches and lit windows

entered.detail: arched ceiling of the covered walkway
stone bench along the corridor wall
stone bench along the corridor wall
window with warm light glowing from within
warm orange lighting from wall torches
metal gate at the end of the corridor leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the balcony view and enters a covered corridor illuminated by warm torchlight. Stone benches line the walls, and lit windows cast a golden glow. The character walks toward an iron gate at the far end of the walkway.

events.description: passing through iron gate from covered corridor to exterior staircase
beginning descent down the stone stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the iron gate and starting down the snow-dusted stone staircase

entered.detail: wide stone stairs descending the mountainside
high stone wall of the castle structure
large burning brazier on a stone pedestal
view of the valley below through the gate

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the iron gate at the end of the corridor, transitioning to an exterior staircase. Large torch braziers illuminate the snow-dusted stone steps as the character begins the descent, with views of the distant valley opening up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: long exterior staircase descending the mountainside

agents.ego_description: descending the long stone staircase flanked by torch braziers, with views of the valley below

entered.detail: snow-covered valley floor visible below
stone stairs with accumulated snow

changed.to: multiple braziers lining the descent left_mid

segments.scene_description: The character continues descending the long exterior stone staircase, flanked by stone balustrades and regularly spaced torch braziers. Snow covers the steps and surrounding landscape, with views of the distant valley and mountains expanding as the descent continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the claustrophobic interior of a gothic castle to an expansive, snow-covered mountain descent. It begins in a dimly lit stone corridor with gothic arches, moving forward as the character emerges through a balcony archway into the cold night air. As the camera follows the character along stone balustrades, the view opens to reveal illuminated castle towers and distant peaks before turning back into a covered walkway bathed in the warm, golden glow of torchlight and windows. The scene then shifts as the character passes through an iron gate, transitioning from the sheltered corridor to a wide exterior staircase. Finally, the camera descends the snow-dusted steps flanked by flickering torch braziers, with the vista of the distant valley and mountains steadily expanding.
